hero.title: Akhdan Ravi Andaman
hero.subtitle: App Developer & Fullstack Web Developer
hero.description: I build polished mobile applications and scalable web experiences — from React Native and Flutter to Next.js and Vue.js. Based in Bogor, Indonesia, I'm passionate about writing clean, purposeful code that puts the user first.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph_1: I'm Akhdan Ravi Andaman, an App Developer and Fullstack Web Developer based in Bogor, Indonesia. I hold a Bachelor of Applied Science in Software Engineering from IPB University (GPA 3.67/4.00), where I developed a deep foundation in both mobile and web engineering.
about.paragraph_2: My primary focus is mobile development — I work across React Native, Kotlin, and Flutter to build intuitive, high-performance applications for iOS and Android. On the web side, I enjoy crafting modern frontends with Next.js and Vue.js, backed by solid fullstack architecture.
about.paragraph_3: Beyond the code, I care about the details that make a product feel truly great: thoughtful UI, smooth interactions, and reliable performance. I'm always exploring new technologies and challenging myself to grow as an engineer and problem-solver.

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.subtitle: A toolkit built across mobile, web, and cloud — refined through real projects and continuous learning.

experience.title: Experience & Education
experience.subtitle: A journey of building, learning, and shipping — across startups, corporates, and academia.

description: Developing and maintaining iOS applications using Swift for enterprise IT consulting clients.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into polished mobile features.
Participating in the full software development lifecycle, from planning and design to deployment and support.

items.company: Bangkit Academy by Google, Tokopedia, Gojek & Traveloka
description: Selected for the prestigious Bangkit Academy cohort — a Google-led program in partnership with Tokopedia, Gojek, and Traveloka.
Specialized in the Android path with a focus on Kotlin and Machine Learning integration in mobile apps.
Collaborated on a capstone project, applying ML models to an Android application with a team of six.
Strengthened version control and collaborative development practices through intensive GitHub workflows.

items.company: PT. Godongijo Asri – The Waterfall Resto & Monster Fishing Lake
description: Led the development of an Augmented Reality mobile experience for a nature-based hospitality business.
Designed and built interactive 3D assets integrated into an Android application using Unity.
Delivered an AR feature that enhanced the visitor experience and was presented to company stakeholders.
Gained hands-on experience bridging creative design and mobile engineering in a real business context.

items.role: Bachelor of Applied Science – Software Engineering
description: Graduated with a GPA of 3.67 / 4.00 in Applied Software Engineering.
Coursework covered mobile development, web engineering, software architecture, databases, and UI/UX design.
Active contributor to campus tech communities and software project teams throughout the program.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected work from real-world clients and personal builds — each one a story of a problem worth solving.

items.name: Company Profile – PT Mitra Graha Integrasi
items.description: A modern, responsive company profile website built for an IT consulting firm. Features a clean content management system, dynamic service and project showcases, and optimized performance using Next.js and Prisma ORM with a MySQL database.

items.name: Serverless Monitoring System
items.description: A lightweight, serverless system for real-time operational monitoring, built entirely on Google Cloud infrastructure. Uses Apps Script for automation and logic, with a Google Sites-based dashboard for zero-maintenance deployment.

items.name: Trash Sorting Android Game
items.description: An educational Android game that teaches waste sorting through interactive gameplay. Built with Unity and recognized with an official Intellectual Property (HKI) certificate, demonstrating its originality and impact in environmental education.

items.name: Company Profile – Training & Certification
items.description: A full-featured web application for a training and certification service provider. Includes course catalog management, participant registration, and an admin dashboard built with Laravel and MySQL.

contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind, or just want to say hello? My inbox is always open.
